description: Lock mobile_robot_navigation to Shakey-era sensing, planning, route-finding, and control rather than GPS/satellite localization.

checks.reason: The node remains anchored to the start of the SRI Shakey project chronology.
GPS is not a direct prerequisite for Shakey-era indoor mobile robot navigation.
The node remains a robotics capability rather than a generic geolocation system.
Control and feedback concepts remain enabling context for mobile robot sensing and action loops.
